bird.name: Orange-billed lorikeet
bird.summary: The orange-billed lorikeet (Neopsittacus pullicauda) is a species in the Old World parrot family Psittaculidae. First described by the Germ…

locations.name: Ernst Hartert
locations.summary: Ernst Johann Otto Hartert (29 October 1859 – 11 November 1933) was a widely published German ornithologist.

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

locations.name: 新幾內亞高地
locations.summary: 新几内亚高地是新幾內亞島上的山脉。其最高点为印度尼西亚境内的查亞峰，海拔4,884米（16,024英尺），同时也是大洋洲的最高峰。该山脉大致呈东西走向横贯全岛，西起印度尼西亞温达马湾县，向东一直延伸至巴布亞新幾內亞米爾恩灣省。 参考文献

locations.name: 休恩半岛
locations.summary: 休恩半岛（Huon Peninsula）也译为胡恩半岛，位于新几内亚岛东岸，巴布亚新几内亚莫雷贝省境内，宽89公里，北临俾斯麦海勇士号海峡，东为所罗门海，南濒休恩湾，西南为馬卡姆河。半岛上的萨鲁瓦吉德岭、罗林森岭（Rawlinson Ra…

locations.name: 多貝拉伊半島
locations.summary: 多貝拉伊半島，又稱鳥頭半島（印尼語：Kepala Burung、荷蘭語：Vogelkop），是印度尼西亞西巴布亞省的大型半島，位於新畿內亞的西北部，東臨極樂鳥灣，南接賓圖尼灣，長約200公里、闊約300公里，南部沿海是平原，北部是海拔3,…

relations.subject: Orange-billed lorikeet
relations.evidence: First described by the German ornithologist Ernst Hartert in 1896, it is endemic to New Guinea, where it mainly inhabits cloud forest, forest edges, and cleared areas bordering forests at elevations of

relations.subject: Orange-billed lorikeet
relations.evidence: It inhabits forest canopy, forest edges, and cleared areas bordering forests at high elevations in mountains in the Central Range and the Huon Peninsula, but is absent from the Bird's Head Peninsula

relations.subject: Orange-billed lorikeet
relations.evidence: It is common throughout most of its range and is not particularly threatened by habitat loss or the wildlife trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
